tasks.name: Save the newest fantasy worldbuilding blog post to your reading list
tasks.description: Locate blog posts about worldbuilding, filter to the Fantasy tag, sort by newest first, open the most recent post, and save it to your reading list so it appears in your saved items.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Blog" link in the main navigation bar.
Click inside the blog search field near the top of the page.
Type "worldbuilding" into the search field and press Enter or click the search icon.
In the tags or categories sidebar, click the "Fantasy" tag to filter the results.
Above the results list, open the sort dropdown and select "Newest First".
Click the title of the first blog post in the sorted results list to open its detail page.
On the blog post page, click the "Save to Reading List" or "Add to Saved Posts" button.

tasks.name: Subscribe to the newsletter with monthly Fantasy and Sci-Fi updates
tasks.description: Sign up for the author’s newsletter using a specific name and email, select monthly frequency, and choose only Fantasy and Science Fiction as preferred genres so your subscription is configured to those topics and cadence.
steps: From any page on the site, click the "Newsletter" link in the header or footer.
On the newsletter signup page, click the "Name" field and type "Alex Reader".
Click the "Email" field and type "alex@example.com".
Open the "Update Frequency" dropdown and select "Monthly".
In the "Preferred Genres" section, check the boxes for "Fantasy" and "Science Fiction".
In the same "Preferred Genres" section, uncheck any other genre checkboxes that are currently selected.
If there is an option like "Include blog updates", ensure it is checked by clicking it once if needed.
Click the "Sign Up" or "Subscribe" button at the bottom of the form.

tasks.name: Add the cheapest 'Chronicles of Aria' ebook under $6 to your wishlist
tasks.description: Browse the books section, filter to the 'Chronicles of Aria' series in ebook format with a maximum price of $6, sort by lowest price, and add the cheapest qualifying book to your wishlist.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Books" link in the main navigation bar.
In the filters panel, open the "Series" dropdown and select "Chronicles of Aria".
In the format or edition filters, select the "eBook" option.
Locate the price filter and enter "6" into the maximum price field, leaving the minimum price field blank or at its default.
Click the "Apply Filters" or similar button to update the results.
Open the sort dropdown above the book grid and select "Price: Low to High".
Click on the cover image or title of the first book in the sorted results list to open its detail page.
On the book detail page, click the "Add to Wishlist" button.

tasks.name: Create a 'Spring Reading Plan' list with the first 3 'Skyward Saga' books in order
tasks.description: Create a new reading list titled 'Spring Reading Plan', find the 'Skyward Saga' series, sort its books by oldest publication date, and add the first three books in that order to the new list.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Reading Lists" or "My Lists" option in the top navigation.
On the lists page, click the "Create New List" button.
In the list name field, type "Spring Reading Plan".
Click the "Save List" or "Create" button to finish creating the new list.
Return to the main navigation and click the "Books" section.
In the filters panel, open the "Series" dropdown and select "Skyward Saga".
Open the sort dropdown above the results and select "Publication Date: Oldest First".
For each of the first three books displayed in this order, click its "Add to List" button and choose "Spring Reading Plan" from the list selection popup.
After adding the third book, click the "Reading Lists" or "My Lists" link again and then click on "Spring Reading Plan" to open the list.

tasks.name: Register for an online Live Q&A event next month in the evening and save it to your events
tasks.description: Find an online Live Q&A event scheduled for the next calendar month, choose a session that starts at or after 6:00 PM, register with your name and email, and add the event to your personal events list on the site.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Events" link in the main navigation bar.
In the event type filters, select the "Online" or "Virtual" option.
Use the date range picker or month selector to set the range to the next calendar month.
In the filtered list, click the title of the first event that includes "Live Q&A" in its name.
On the event detail page, locate the session selector or schedule list and choose a time slot that starts at or after "6:00 PM".
Click the "Register" button associated with the selected time slot.
In the registration form, click the name field and type "Jordan Lee".
Click the email field and type "jordan@example.com".
After submitting the form, click the "Add to My Events" or "Save to My Events" button shown on the confirmation screen.

tasks.name: Copy a share link for the most-liked quote from 'The Moonlit Archive'
tasks.description: Go to the quotes section, filter quotes for the book 'The Moonlit Archive', sort them by most liked so the top quote has the highest likes (e.g., 50+), open that quote, and copy its shareable link.
steps: From any page, open the "Extras" menu and click on the "Quotes" option.
In the book filter dropdown on the quotes page, select "The Moonlit Archive".
Open the sort dropdown and choose "Most Liked".
Click on the first quote card in the sorted list to open its detail page.
On the quote detail page, click the "Copy Share Link" or "Get Link" button.
In the dialog or field that shows the generated URL, click inside the URL field and press Ctrl+C (or Command+C on Mac) to copy the link.
Click the "Close" or "Done" button to dismiss the dialog.

tasks.name: Add a digital bundle under $25 with at least 4 ebooks to your cart
tasks.description: Browse bundle offers, filter to digital/ebook bundles priced under $25 that contain at least 4 books, open the first qualifying bundle, and add one copy of it to your cart.
steps: From the homepage, click "Shop" in the main navigation and select "Bundles" from the dropdown menu.
In the price filter section, set the maximum price field to "25" and leave the minimum price blank or at its default.
In the format filter, select "eBook" or "Digital" so only digital bundles are shown.
In the bundles filters, open the "Books in Bundle" or similar dropdown and select "4 or more".
Click the "Apply Filters" button to update the bundle list.
From the filtered results, click on the title or image of the first bundle that indicates it contains 4 or more books in its description.
On the bundle detail page, ensure the quantity selector is set to "1" by clicking the quantity field and selecting or typing "1" if needed.
Click the "Add to Cart" button to place the bundle in your cart.

tasks.name: Post a comment on the most-commented 'Writing Tips' blog post from 2024
tasks.description: Find blog posts tagged 'Writing Tips' from the year 2024, sort them by most commented, open the post with the highest number of comments, and submit a new comment with specific text using your name and email.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Blog" link in the main navigation bar.
In the tags or categories list, click on the "Writing Tips" tag.
Use the date or year filter to select the year "2024".
Open the sort dropdown above the post list and choose "Most Commented".
Click the title of the first blog post in the sorted list to open its detail page.
Scroll down to the comments section and click inside the "Name" field of the comment form.
Type "Taylor" into the name field.
Click the "Email" field and type "taylor@example.com".
Click inside the main comment text area and type "These writing tips are very helpful. I plan to use at least two of them this week.", then click the "Post Comment" or "Submit" button.

website_type: author blog and book promotion website
